channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani to meet President Trump at the White House despite recent criticism
item.description: President Donald Trump is set to host New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani for a face-to-face meeting at the White House, just days after criticising him during the State of the Union address. During th...

item.title: Toddler survives 10ft fall from St Petersburg tower block thanks to quick-thinking nurses
item.description: A toddler in St Petersburg, Russia, miraculously survived a 10-foot fall from a tower block window, thanks to the quick actions of two nurses who used a coat to catch him. The 18-month-old had been un...

item.title: Two Men Charged After Mistaken Identity Kidnapping Leads to Death of 85-Year-Old in Sydney
item.description: Two men have been charged in connection with the alleged kidnapping and murder of 85-year-old Chris Baghsarian in Sydney, Australia. Detectives from the New South Wales (NSW) Police Force began invest...

item.title: UK government to approve £1bn defence helicopter deal to secure jobs
item.description: The UK government is set to approve a £1bn deal for the purchase of military helicopters from the country's last remaining specialist factory, Leonardo's site in Yeovil, Somerset. The contract, which ...

item.title: Snowball fight in New York escalates, causing tension between Mayor Mamdani and police unions
item.description: During a recent blizzard in New York City, a snowball fight in Washington Square Park escalated into a confrontation with police officers. Video footage shows parkgoers throwing snow and ice at office...

item.title: Former Gamekeeper David Campbell Convicted of Murdering Ex-Colleague Brian Low in 2024 Ambush Near Aberfeldy
item.description: In the small Scottish village of Aberfeldy, Perthshire, a long-standing grudge culminated in a premeditated murder on February 16, 2024. Brian Low, 65, was shot dead with a shotgun at close range whil...

item.title: Disorder and division mark Your Party’s delayed committee election results
item.description: Your Party’s election for its 24 leadership posts on the central executive committee descended into confusion and delay, reinforcing its reputation for internal division and organisational disorder. T...

item.title: Arvid Lindblad’s heritage, upbringing and rapid rise to become Britain’s youngest Formula 1 driver
item.description: Arvid Lindblad, aged 18, is set to become Britain’s youngest-ever Formula 1 driver as he prepares to make his debut with Racing Bulls at the Australian Grand Prix. Speaking in Bahrain during pre-seaso...

item.title: Two men arrested in New York for alleged hate crime involving racial abuse and attempted arson against Black woman
item.description: Two men, Michael James and Michael Santiago, were arrested in New York City after an alleged incident of racial abuse and attempted arson in the Chelsea neighbourhood on 19 February. James, who was we...

item.title: Rachel Reeves to Deliver Low-Key Spring Statement Amid Fragile UK Economic Conditions
item.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves will deliver her spring statement in the House of Commons on 3 March, presenting updated economic forecasts and a financial update expected to last around 20 minutes. Unlike l...

item.title: London man’s £10,000 video game console purchase leads to police raid after Sega investigation
item.description: A 32-year-old man, Darius Khan, from Stratford, London, has had his life turned upside down after buying a range of rare video game consoles and prototypes for nearly £10,000, only to be raided by pol...

item.title: Sicilian farmers harness Etna volcanic ash as sustainable fertiliser
item.description: In Sicily, farmers living near Mount Etna are transforming the challenge of frequent volcanic ashfall into an agricultural opportunity. For decades, residents of towns like Giarre and Linguaglossa hav...

item.title: David Campbell convicted of murdering former colleague Brian Low in Aberfeldy
item.description: A former head gamekeeper, David Campbell, 77, has been convicted of murdering his ex-colleague Brian Low, 65, on a secluded path in Aberfeldy, Highland Perthshire, in February 2024. Initially, Low's d...

item.title: OPPO's New Shenzhen Headquarters: A Glimpse into the Future of Tech Workspaces
item.description: Designed by Zaha Hadid Architects, the new OPPO headquarters in Shenzhen is a bold statement of futuristic design. The building, which began development in 2020, consists of four interconnected high-r...

item.title: UK Ministry of Defence reviews RAF records for flights linked to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: The UK Ministry of Defence (MoD) has initiated a comprehensive review to determine whether the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein utilised Royal Air Force (RAF) bases during visits to the Uni...

item.title: Details of the villa where Jalisco cartel leader 'El Mencho' was killed
item.description: Nemesio Ruben Oseguera Cervantes, widely known as 'El Mencho', leader of the powerful Jalisco New Generation Cartel, spent his final hours in a luxury villa in the Tapalpa Country Club, Jalisco, befor...

item.title: A Comparison of IPL, Epilator, and Laser Hair Removal Methods
item.description: The article examines three popular hair removal methods: IPL (Intense Pulsed Light), epilators, and laser hair removal. It discusses how IPL devices work by emitting pulses of light to target hair fol...

item.title: BBC Reports from Culiacán Amid Surge of Cartel Violence Following Death of CJNG Leader
item.description: A surge of violence has swept across Mexico following the reported death of Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, known as “El Mencho,” leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG). After his capture duri...

item.title: Nvidia Reports Record Revenue Over $200 Billion for Fiscal 2026 Amid Strong AI Chip Demand
item.description: Nvidia, the world's most valuable company, released its fiscal 2026 financial results, showcasing exceptional performance that alleviated concerns about a potential AI investment bubble bursting. The ...

item.title: Six Cuban Exiles Held After Armed Speedboat Incident Amid US-Cuba Tensions
item.description: Six Cuban exiles were held under guard in hospital following an armed attempt to infiltrate Cuba by speedboat, in which four others were killed when Cuban forces returned fire. The suspects were repor...
